Profile

Enthusiastic and detail-oriented Frontend Developer with over 6 years of experience creating responsive, user-focused web interfaces. Skilled in translating complex designs into functional code, optimizing performance, and ensuring cross-browser compatibility. Passionate about dark luxury aesthetics, scroll-triggered animations, and AI-integrated interfaces.
